blocks.text: Woodland is running away with Houston at -21 while Reitan and Ventura both fade badly — T120 and T116. A quiet Monday, but Wednesday changes the register entirely.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates; the road to the World Championship challenger spot starts now
🚴 Wed 11:55 — Dwars door Vlaanderen; Wærenskjold leads Norway's Flanders warm-up charge
